steps.title: Identify the task requirement
steps.content: The prompt explicitly states the student wants to “provide an example of a sky island.” The notes name one specific sky island: the Los Ajos-La Madera Mountains. To accomplish the stated goal, the answer must cite this concrete example, not just define or characterize sky islands in general.

steps.title: Find the choice that provides the example
steps.content:
The correct answer uses “such as” to name the Los Ajos-La Madera Mountains as a specific example of a sky island, directly fulfilling the task requirement.

The other choices discuss sky islands in general terms or include NPS quotes but never mention this specific mountain range.

That is the correct answer.
